modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble selecting and moving cells in Excel worksheet.

full_description_text: User is trying to select and move cells in Excel. They can't figure out how to do it. They want to know how to select and then move the cells. It's a basic task but they are stuck on it.
short_description: Trouble selecting and moving cells in Excel worksheet.
description: User is trying to select and move cells in Excel. They can't figure out how to do it. They want to know how to select and then move the cells. It's a basic task but they are stuck on it.
